name: seeds-and-mulch
description: Track repository work with Seeds and preserve durable expertise with Mulch.

interface.shortDescription: Track work and compound repository expertise.
interface.longDescription: Use Seeds as the lightweight, git-native source of truth for epics, features, tasks, bugs, plans, dependencies, and status. Orchestrate explicit goals with sub-agents in the current task, then preserve durable repository knowledge with Mulch.
defaultPrompt: Track this work with Seeds and preserve its learnings.
Turn this feature into a Seeds epic and tasks.
Orchestrate this Seeds epic with a goal and sub-agents.
